headline: 3 Value Stocks That Fall Short
summary: The low valuation multiples for value stocks provide a margin of safety that growth stocks rarely offer. However, the challenge lies in determining whether these cheap assets are genuinely undervalued or simply on sale due to their potentially deteriorating business models.

headline: What Keeps Costco Wholesale Stock Grinding Higher
summary: Everyone is watching the slowdown in new sign-ups, but the real power is coming from a much more valuable group of shoppers.

headline: The Kroger Co. set to purchase Giant Eagle Inc.
summary: JOHNSTOWN, Pa. – The Kroger Co. is purchasing Giant Eagle Inc. for a price of $1.65 billion. Kroger, a Cincinnati-based, publicly traded company, announced Wednesday that it has an agreement to acquire the family-owned food and pharmacy retailer. The transaction is expected to close in 2027, Kroger said in a press release. “In connection with obtaining the requisite regulatory clearance ...
